'''tathumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoforestry|mycoforestry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoforestry|mycoforestry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tathumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæthimith|tæthimith]] || [[word:tæthimij|tæthimij]] || [[word:tæthimish|tæthimish]] || [[word:tæthimi|tæthimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathuthumuth|tathuthumuth]] || [[word:tathuthumuj|tathuthumuj]] || [[word:tathuthumush|tathuthumush]] || [[word:tathuthumu|tathuthumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathumuth|tathumuth]] || [[word:tathumuj|tathumuj]] || [[word:tathumush|tathumush]] || [[word:tathumu|tathumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathufmuth|tathufmuth]] || [[word:tathufmuj|tathufmuj]] || [[word:tathufmush|tathufmush]] || [[word:tathufmuf|tathufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tathumuthu|tathumuthu]] || [[word:tathumuju|tathumuju]] || [[word:tathumushu|tathumushu]] || [[word:tathumuku|tathumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tathumuth|tathumuth]] || [[word:tathumuj|tathumuj]] || [[word:tathumush|tathumush]] || [[word:tathumu|tathumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tathumuthul|tathumuthul]] || [[word:tathumujul|tathumujul]] || [[word:tathumushul|tathumushul]] || [[word:tathumukul|tathumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tathumuthuthu|tathumuthuthu]] || [[word:tathumujuju|tathumujuju]] || [[word:tathumushushu|tathumushushu]] || [[word:tathumuku|tathumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tathumuthun|tathumuthun]] || [[word:tathumujun|tathumujun]] || [[word:tathumushun|tathumushun]] || [[word:tathumukun|tathumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tathumuthuoro|tathumuthuoro]] || [[word:tathumujuoro|tathumujuoro]] || [[word:tathumushuoro|tathumushuoro]] || [[word:tathumukuoro|tathumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
